description: F56 create+delete safe sender lifecycle (Sprint 41 F97, round 2 fix 2026-06-14). Creates an Entire-Domain safe sender for 'winwright-test.com' (a non-existent domain chosen to avoid duplicate-check collision), confirms the save dialog, then uses the Manage Safe Senders search box to locate and delete the created pattern in a teardown testCase -- net DB change is zero. TEST DATA: 'winwright-test.com' verified absent from safe_senders table (count=0) at authoring time. Domain has TLD 'com' which is in kIanaTlds. Generated pattern: @(?:[a-z0-9-]+\.)*winwright-test\.com$ , type: entire_domain. DEFAULT TYPE: Entire Domain is the default selection on the Add Safe Sender screen (ManualRuleCreateScreen initState); SelectionItemPattern IsSelected=True confirmed via live UIA inspect -- no radio click needed. TLD type is not available for safe senders (only Entire Domain, Exact Domain, Exact Email). FIX 1 -- MAXIMIZE: ww_window_state maximize added as first step. Verified live: after maximize, Save Rule is IsOffscreen=False at y=654 (window 1020px+ tall). No ww_scroll step needed -- scroll caused a race condition in the runner (see block-rule script description). FIX 2 -- SAVE BUTTON INVOKE->CLICK: ww_invoke replaced with ww_click for Save Rule. CONFIRMATION DIALOG: 'Confirm Safe Sender' Alert with Button[name='Save'] -- verified live (NOT 'Save Rule', just 'Save'). TEARDOWN: search 'winwright-test' in Edit[name*='Search patterns'], click Button[name*='View safe sender details'], Delete x2 (first Delete opens 'Delete Safe Sender' confirm, second confirms), Back x2 to home -- all selectors verified live. INPUT FIELD: type=Edit[name='Enter email, domain, or URL'] -- same name in Entire-Domain mode on both block-rule and safe-sender create screens.

testCases.title: Create Entire Domain safe sender for winwright-test.com
Delete the winwright-test.com safe sender (teardown -- restores DB state)
